name: Horizon Group USA Bluey Aqua Art - Reusable Water Reveal Activity Pages With Water Pen for No-Mess Drawing and Coloring
bullets: JUST USE WATER: This water-reveal activity pad features 4 aqua art sheets and 4 story sheets, putting an awesome, Bluey spin on traditional coloring books — no paints, no markers, no mess!
REUSABLE: When the pen runs out of water and the colors fade away, simply refill and reuse to bring them back to life!
REVEAL SURPRISES: Fill the provided brush pen with water to color on the pages to reveal the vibrant colors underneath with all kinds of hidden surprises!
REVEAL SURPRISES: Fill the provided brush pen with water to color on the pages to reveal the vibrant colors underneath with all kinds of hidden surprises!
KIT INCLUDES: 1 Spiral-Bound Water Reveal Pad (6 in. x 7.5 in., 4 Sheets), 1 Water Brush Pen
description: Discover just how awesome it is to get creative with the Bluey Aqua Art Pad! This water activity book puts an exciting twist on traditional coloring books! Use a magical water brush pen to transform 4 aqua art sheets and 4 story sheets into colorful Bluey scenes and reveal all kinds of surprises! Simply unscrew the brush pen, fill it with water, and follow the prompts on each page to start your adventure with your favorite cast of Bluey characters. From pool parties with Squirts and Uncle Stripes to Bluey beach days and treasure hunts, every page inside this spiral-bound pad features interacti

reviews.name: Cassie
reviews.title: Daily Creative Fun: Bluey Water Reveal Art
reviews.body: This Bluey water activity set has become an absolute staple in our house, and we find ourselves reaching for it every single day. The reusable pages are fantastic because they provide endless entertainment without any of the mess of traditional paints or markers. A huge highlight is the quality of the water pen that comes with it—it works so well that we actually use it as our go-to pen for all…

reviews.name: ChaCha
reviews.title: Perfect Road Trip Activity for Toddlers — Mess-Free & Reusable
reviews.body: The media could not be loaded. The Bluey Aqua Art - Reusable Water Reveal Activity Pages With Water Pen was a lifesaver on a recent road trip with my 2-year-old. I specifically wanted something mess-free that would keep her entertained in the car, and this worked so well.She loved seeing the pictures and colors appear with the water pen, especially because she already loves Bluey. The activity…

reviews.name: Josh
reviews.title: This product not only fosters artistic expression but also encourages fine motor skills
reviews.body: Horizon Group USA's Bluey Aqua Art offers an innovative and engaging way for children to explore their creativity without the mess typically associated with traditional art supplies. The reusable water reveal activity pages come with a water pen that allows young artists to create vibrant images simply by adding water. Once the pages dry, the colors fade, enabling repeated use and endless fun.…

reviews.name: Julie Stenger
reviews.title: A Paw-some Win for Little Artists
reviews.body: If you are looking for a mess-free way to keep a Bluey fan entertained, the Horizon Group USA Bluey Aqua Art set is an absolute life saver.Why We Love It: Zero Mess, All Magic. The best part is that it only uses water. No marker streaks on the sofa. No stained fingers. No, "Oops ... I colored the rug" moments.Once the water dries, the colors disappear and the pages can be repainted over and over…
